holdings.infoBox: ARKQ is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tesla stock at 10.17%, Space Exploration Technologies at 6.69%, Teradyne at 6.42%, Advanced Micro Devices at 6.41%, and Kratos Defense & Security Solutions at 5.30%.

overview.description: The ARK Autonomous Technology & Robotics ETF (ARKQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund with a broad mandate to invest in companies that its managers identify as benefiting from automation and other technological advancements. ARKQ was launched on Sep 30, 2014 and is issued by ARK.

data.title: Silicon Valley's new slogan: Let's get physical
data.text: Startups, Big Tech, and research labs are all ramping up their robotics efforts. Robotics and physical AI companies have raised more than $23 billion so far this year.
